metadata_used.pose_description: Subject lying prone on a rectangular cushion. Torso and thighs flat against the surface. Knees bent at a 90-degree angle with feet pointing upward. Arms extended forward out of frame.
metadata_used.camera_move: Camera slowly dollies forward and slightly upward, increasing tension along the spine.
metadata_used.body_move: Subject subtly arches their lower back, shifting weight slightly while keeping knees bent.
